places.name: Eiffel Tower
places.annotation: Iconic iron lattice tower in Paris, France. Built in 1889 for the World's Fair. A must-visit landmark and symbol of Paris.

places.name: Big Ben & Parliament
places.annotation: Historic clock tower and seat of British Parliament in London. The bell inside the tower is famously known as Big Ben.

places.name: Statue of Liberty
places.annotation: Colossal neoclassical sculpture on Liberty Island in New York Harbor. A symbol of freedom and democracy since 1886.

places.name: Colosseum
places.annotation: Ancient Roman amphitheater in Rome, Italy. One of the most impressive structures from ancient Rome, built between 70-80 AD.

places.name: Taj Mahal
places.annotation: Magnificent white marble mausoleum in Agra, India. Built by Emperor Shah Jahan as a tribute to his beloved wife Mumtaz Mahal.
